item.title: Powertech 和 Broadcom 斥资 4 亿美元在新加坡成立 FOPLP 合资企业，扩大 AI ASIC 业务
item.summary: Powertech Technology is deepening its panel-level packaging (FOPLP) strategy after its board approved a joint venture with Broadcom in Singapore to build panel-level advanced packaging (PLP) manufacturing capacity, with the planned investment totaling US$400 million.
